nasb.text: I will drive him like a peg in a firm place, And he will become a throne of glory to his father’s house.

esv.text: And I will fasten him like a peg in a secure place, and he will become a throne of honor to his father’s house.

cnv.text: 我必堅立他，像釘子釘在穩固的地方； 他必作父家榮耀的寶座。

ccb.text: 我要使他像深嵌在坚固之处的橛子一样稳固，他必给他的家族带来尊荣。

csbs.text: 我要把他像橛子一样钉在牢固的地方。对他父家，他必成为荣耀的宝座。
